lint.command: cd apps/ios && xcodebuild -project ADE.xcodeproj -scheme ADE -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,id=2107A402-C2A7-4323-AF26-74A0AC406C44' -derivedDataPath /tmp/ade-build analyze

blockingIssues.description: `apps/ios/ADE/Views/LanesTabView.swift:1066` still forces a bouncy spring animation after `ADEMotion.emphasis(reduceMotion:)`, so Reduce Motion users do not get the required simpler transition fallback for lane-detail section changes.

`apps/ios/ADE/Views/WorkTabView.swift:1207` still loads the full transcript into memory and renders chat history inside a plain `VStack` in `ScrollView`, so the promised lazy or paged performance pass for large chats is not implemented.

appliedUpdates.description: Added iOS 26 `matchedTransitionSource` and `.navigationTransition(.zoom(sourceID:in:))` guidance, plus a Reduce Motion fallback note, to `.factory/library/ios-design-system.md`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align future iOS mission guidance so simulator screenshot validation is not required in `mission.md` when the mission AGENTS file forbids launching the simulator or taking screenshots in this environment.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `polish-and-integration` review found `/Users/admin/.factory/missions/68540ffe-393c-4cd9-ae06-48bb48e3a3ef/mission.md:145-146` still requires simulator screenshots while `/Users/admin/.factory/missions/68540ffe-393c-4cd9-ae06-48bb48e3a3ef/AGENTS.md:84` says 'DO NOT launch the simulator or take screenshots.'
